name: Bug Report
about: Something is broken or behaving unexpectedly
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Directive (YAML)

```yaml
# paste your directive here (remove any sensitive URLs/credentials)
```

## Command you ran

```bash
python -m scraper.main scrape ...
```

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include the full error traceback if applicable.

```
paste error here
```

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11]
- Scrapit version / commit: [e.g. `git log --oneline -1`]
- Backend used: [beautifulsoup / playwright]
